english_citation_sentences: Optical spray experiments offer a complementary pathway, yielding reproducible observations of the liquid-phase envelope; among these, high-speed Mie scattering imaging is particularly well-suited for examining liquid boundaries and macroscopic penetration evolution \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging}. || Among these techniques, high-speed Mie imaging is especially suitable for observing liquid-phase boundaries and macroscopic penetration evolution \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging}. || Mie scattering is widely used for dense liquid-phase spray visualization, a primary reason being its relatively concise experimental implementation; compared to many alternative diagnostic techniques, Mie imaging is easier to integrate with high-speed photography platforms, thereby achieving high temporal resolution \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging}. || Its scattering response depends on droplet size distribution, number density, refractive index, wavelength, scattering angle relative to the illumination direction, and path length through the spray volume; in dense regions, multiple scattering and shadowing effects further alter the image intensity distribution \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging}. || While all these methods have their respective values, their alignment with the target observables differs for the non-evaporating, non-reacting liquid-phase diesel sprays focused on in this thesis: LIF, PIV, and PDPA lean toward component, flow field, or single-point size-velocity measurements, which struggle to directly support the high-temporal-resolution liquid-phase envelope tracking required here; Although Schlieren and Shadowgraph can provide spray shape information, their specificity for liquid-phase boundaries is not as explicit as that of droplet scattering methods; DBI and Mie are much closer to the tasks of extracting liquid-phase contours, penetration, and cone angles that this thesis concerns \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging}. || Volume-illuminated Mie imaging instead operates with continuous illumination, shifting the temporal-resolution burden from the laser onto the high-speed camera and avoiding the cost of a high-repetition-rate pulsed laser system altogether \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging}. || Based on the aforementioned methodological attributes, this thesis does not interpret pixel intensities as thermodynamic ground truths for direct inversion, but rather treats them as geometric cues for the liquid-phase boundaries; The image processing objectives are explicitly restricted to extracting operational observables such as penetration, cone angle, projected area, and boundary positions, as such geometric descriptions are more defensible than claims of precise liquid-phase distributions \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging,LefebvreMcDonell2017}. || Among these, penetration is the core input for subsequent trajectory fitting, surrogate modeling, and wall-impingement risk screening \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging,LefebvreMcDonell2017,Dent1971Penetration,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996}. || Mie imaging also carries a characteristic physical limitation of multiple scattering: In the dense liquid core region near the nozzle, the high droplet number density produces intense forward-scattered and wide-angle scattered light that redistributes intensity spatially, blurring the sharp liquid-phase boundary and producing a diffuse halo rather than a clear edge \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,Berrocal2007MultipleScattering}. || This sequence is critical for Mie videos, as the raw intensity is not a direct measure of liquid volume fraction; the actual goal is to stably extract geometry under non-uniform illumination, glare, and background textures, rather than performing a rigorous optical inversion \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,GonzalezWoodsDIP}. || Quantitative computations use a robust background estimation from pre-injection statistics, and convert the representation into an edge-dominant Sobel feature space, ensuring the geometric response is dictated by fixed operators and local boundary structures rather than display brightness \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,GonzalezWoodsDIP}. || These metrics are important because they compress each aligned strip into a compact geometric state vector; however, the downstream modeling in this work remains centered on penetration, as it is the most well-supported target in existing analyses \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging,LefebvreMcDonell2017}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 光学喷雾实验则提供了互补路径，能够给出可重复的液相包络观测；其中，高速 Mie 成像尤其适合观察液相边界和宏观贯穿距离演化 \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging}。 || 与此同时，光学喷雾实验能够在受控环境下提供可重复、可横向比较的液相包络证据， 高速 Mie 成像尤其适合观察液相边界和宏观贯穿距离演化 \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging}。 || Mie 散射被广泛用于致密液相喷雾可视化，一个重要原因在于其实验实现相对简洁； 与许多替代诊断手段相比，Mie 成像更易与高速摄影平台结合，从而获得较高时间分辨率 \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging}。 || 其散射响应取决于液滴粒径分布、数密度、折射率、波长、相对于照明方向的散射角以及穿越喷雾体的路径长度；在致密区域中，多重散射和阴影效应还会进一步改变图像强度分布 \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging}。 || 这些方法均具有各自价值，但对于本文关注的非蒸发、非反应液相柴油喷雾而言，它们与目标观测量的匹配程度并不相同： LIF、PIV 和 PDPA 更偏向组分、流场或单点粒径速度测量，难以直接支撑本文所需的高时间分辨率液相包络追踪； Schlieren 与 Shadowgraph 虽可提供喷雾外形信息，但对液相边界的针对性不如液滴散射类方法明确； DBI 与 Mie 则更接近本文关心的液相轮廓、贯穿距离与锥角提取任务 \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging}。 || 体照明 Mie 成像则可在连续照明下工作，将时间分辨率的负担从激光器转移到高速相机上，从而完全避免了高重频脉冲激光系统的高昂成本 \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging}。 || 基于上述方法属性，本文不将像素强度解释为可直接反演的热力学真值，而是将其作为液相边界的几何线索； 图像处理目标也被明确限定为提取贯穿距离、锥角、投影面积和边界位置等操作性观测量，这类几何描述比精确液相分布的主张更可辩护 \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging,LefebvreMcDonell2017}。 || 其中，贯穿距离是后续轨迹拟合、代理模型建模与撞壁风险筛查的核心输入 \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging,LefebvreMcDonell2017,Dent1971Penetration,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996}。 || Mie 成像还带有一个特征性的多重散射物理限制： 在喷嘴附近的致密液核区域，高液滴数密度产生强烈的前向散射和大角度散射光，在空间上重新分配强度，模糊了清晰的液相边界，从而产生弥散光晕而非清晰边缘 \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,Berrocal2007MultipleScattering}。 || 这一序列对 Mie 视频很重要，因为原始强度并不是液体体积分数的直接度量，而实际目标是在非均匀照明、眩光和背景纹理下稳定提取几何，而不是做精确光学反演 \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,GonzalezWoodsDIP}。 || 定量计算则使用喷射前统计得到的稳健背景估计，再把表示转换成边缘主导的 Sobel 特征，使几何响应主要由固定算子和局部边界结构决定，而不是由显示亮度决定 \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,GonzalezWoodsDIP}。 || 这些度量之所以重要，是因为它们把每条对齐后的条带压缩成一个紧凑的几何状态向量；不过，本文的下游建模仍然以穿深为中心，因为在现有分析里它是支持最充分的目标 \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging,LefebvreMcDonell2017}。
english_reference_meaning: Supports the limits and usefulness of optical spray imaging and Mie-scattering diagnostics for extracting liquid-envelope observables.
chinese_reference_meaning: 用于支撑光学喷雾成像和 Mie 散射诊断的适用性及局限，说明液相包络只能作为操作性观测量解释。

authors: Pickett, Lyle M. and Genzale, Caroline L. and Manin, Julien and Malbec, Louis-Marie and Hermant, Laurent
title: Measurement Uncertainty of Liquid Penetration in Evaporating Diesel Sprays
container: Proceedings of the ILASS Americas 23rd Annual Conference on Liquid Atomization and Spray Systems
manual_reason: No DOI is present in the BibTeX entry; use the ECN page or ILASS proceedings record manually if needed.
english_citation_sentences: DBI (Diffuse Background Illumination) measures path-integrated extinction by applying the Beer--Lambert law to a spatially uniform diffuse transmitted-light field, yielding a measurement proportional to the liquid volume fraction integrated along the line of sight, and is typically suitable for extracting liquid-phase contours \cite{Pickett2011DBISAEref}; Schlieren responds to the first spatial derivative of the refractive index field, while Shadowgraph responds to its second derivative (the Laplacian); both can image liquid-spray boundaries through the refractive index discontinuity at the liquid–gas interface, but their signals are simultaneously modulated by gas-phase density gradients and vapour-phase distributions in evaporating conditions, making it harder to isolate the pure liquid-phase boundary compared to droplet scattering methods; LIF characterizes vapor distribution or equivalence ratio through fuel or tracer fluorescence (liquid-phase LIF and exciplex techniques can also separate liquid and vapor contributions \cite{Suzuki1990}, but both require fluorescent additives or dedicated tracer compounds that impose chemical compatibility constraints, which effectively precludes their use with commercial diesel in facilities such as the OSCC); PIV focuses on velocity fields and turbulent structures; PDPA provides single-point droplet size and velocity information; reconstructing a two-dimensional spray envelope requires spatial scanning, making it unsuitable for instantaneous full-field multi-plume characterisation.
chinese_citation_sentences: DBI（漫反射背光成像）通过将 Beer--Lambert 定律应用于空间均匀的漫透射光场来测量路径积分消光，给出沿视线积分的液体体积分数，通常适合提取液相轮廓 \cite{Pickett2011DBISAEref}； Schlieren 响应折射率场的一阶空间导数，Shadowgraph 响应其二阶导数（Laplacian）；两者均可通过液气界面处的折射率不连续性成像液相喷雾边界，但其信号同时受气相密度梯度以及蒸发工况下蒸汽相分布的调制，使得与液滴散射类方法相比，对纯液相边界的针对性更弱； LIF 通过燃料或示踪剂荧光表征蒸汽分布或当量比（液相 LIF 和双分子荧光技术可同时分辨液相与气相贡献 \cite{Suzuki1990}，但两者均需荧光添加剂或专用示踪剂，会对测试流体产生化学相容性约束，在 OSCC 等使用商用柴油的设施中实际不可行）； PIV 关注速度场与湍流结构； PDPA 则提供单点液滴粒径与速度信息；重建二维喷雾包络需要空间扫描，不适合瞬态全场多孔喷油束表征。
english_reference_meaning: Supports DBI/extinction-based liquid-penetration and liquid-length diagnostics for evaporating diesel sprays.
chinese_reference_meaning: 用于支撑基于 DBI/消光成像的蒸发柴油喷雾液相穿深与液相长度诊断。
verification_notes: Verified via the Engine Combustion Network references and liquid-length diagnostics page; ECN lists Pickett, Genzale, Manin, Malbec, and Hermant, ILASS Americas 2011, and identifies DBI as a diffused back-illumination extinction diagnostic.

title: Simultaneous Concentration Measurement of Vapor and Liquid in an Evaporating Diesel Spray

english_citation_sentences: DBI (Diffuse Background Illumination) measures path-integrated extinction by applying the Beer--Lambert law to a spatially uniform diffuse transmitted-light field, yielding a measurement proportional to the liquid volume fraction integrated along the line of sight, and is typically suitable for extracting liquid-phase contours \cite{Pickett2011DBISAEref}; Schlieren responds to the first spatial derivative of the refractive index field, while Shadowgraph responds to its second derivative (the Laplacian); both can image liquid-spray boundaries through the refractive index discontinuity at the liquid–gas interface, but their signals are simultaneously modulated by gas-phase density gradients and vapour-phase distributions in evaporating conditions, making it harder to isolate the pure liquid-phase boundary compared to droplet scattering methods; LIF characterizes vapor distribution or equivalence ratio through fuel or tracer fluorescence (liquid-phase LIF and exciplex techniques can also separate liquid and vapor contributions \cite{Suzuki1990}, but both require fluorescent additives or dedicated tracer compounds that impose chemical compatibility constraints, which effectively precludes their use with commercial diesel in facilities such as the OSCC); PIV focuses on velocity fields and turbulent structures; PDPA provides single-point droplet size and velocity information; reconstructing a two-dimensional spray envelope requires spatial scanning, making it unsuitable for instantaneous full-field multi-plume characterisation.

authors: Zhou, Xinyi and Li, Tie and Yi, Ping
title: Modeling of Diesel Spray Tip Penetration During Start-of-Injection Transients
manual_reason: No clearly legal open PDF/HTML download was found automatically; use the DOI/URL manually or through institutional access if needed.
english_citation_sentences: Empirical models feature a compact structure and are readily interpretable, yet short pilot injections make them harder to apply, as the observable window may be mostly dominated by the start-of-injection and end-of-injection transients \cite{ZhouLiYi2021,ZhouLiLaiWei2019}. || Classical empirical penetration laws remain physically valuable, but their applicability becomes more limited when the observable window is dominated by start-of-injection and end-of-injection transients \cite{HiroyasuArai1990,ZhouLiYi2021,ZhouLiLaiWei2019}. || on injection start transients shows that when sac pressurization and needle valve opening processes are non-negligible, the early penetration behavior is more complex than classical two-stage laws; During the start of injection (SOI) phase, penetration initially approximates a \(t^{3/2}\) scaling, then transitions to \(t^{3/4}\), and only later gradually approaches a \(t^{1/2}\) behavior \cite{ZhouLiYi2021}. || Zhou et al.\ further established that the SOI acceleration phase follows an uncertain exponent that is difficult to characterise from short, noisy Mie trajectories \cite{ZhouLiYi2021}; in practice, the fitting window begins effectively in the post-\(t_b\) regime.
chinese_citation_sentences: 经验模型结构紧凑且便于解释，但短预喷会使其使用更加困难，因为可观测窗口可能主要由喷射起始与喷射终止瞬态占据 \cite{ZhouLiYi2021,ZhouLiLaiWei2019}。 || 经典经验贯穿距离定律在物理上仍具有重要价值，但当观测窗口主要由喷射起始与喷射终止瞬态占据时， 其适用性会明显下降，或需以显著增加模型复杂度为代价 \cite{HiroyasuArai1990,ZhouLiYi2021,ZhouLiLaiWei2019}。 || Zhou 等关于喷射起始瞬态的研究表明，当 sac 加压和针阀开启过程不可忽略时，早期贯穿距离行为比经典两阶段定律更为复杂； 在喷射起始（SOI）阶段，贯穿距离先近似呈 \(t^{3/2}\) 标度，随后转向 \(t^{3/4}\)，再之后才逐渐接近 \(t^{1/2}\) 行为 \cite{ZhouLiYi2021}。 || Zhou 等人进一步表明，SOI 加速段遵循指数不确定的幂律，从短时、有噪声的 Mie 轨迹中难以表征\cite{ZhouLiYi2021}；实际上，拟合窗口有效地从破碎后区间开始。
english_reference_meaning: Supports the claim that start-of-injection transients can deviate from a rigid classical penetration law during short pilot injections.
chinese_reference_meaning: 用于说明短预喷中的起始注入瞬态会偏离单一经典穿深定律。

authors: Zhou, Xinyi and Li, Tie and Lai, Zheyuan and Wei, Yijie
title: Modeling Diesel Spray Tip and Tail Penetrations After End-of-Injection
manual_reason: No clearly legal open PDF/HTML download was found automatically; use the DOI/URL manually or through institutional access if needed.
english_citation_sentences: Empirical models feature a compact structure and are readily interpretable, yet short pilot injections make them harder to apply, as the observable window may be mostly dominated by the start-of-injection and end-of-injection transients \cite{ZhouLiYi2021,ZhouLiLaiWei2019}. || Classical empirical penetration laws remain physically valuable, but their applicability becomes more limited when the observable window is dominated by start-of-injection and end-of-injection transients \cite{HiroyasuArai1990,ZhouLiYi2021,ZhouLiLaiWei2019}. || Zhou et al.\ showed that after the end of injection (EOI) the tip penetration enters a deceleration branch in which the time coordinate shifts from the ASOI clock $t$ to a delayed clock $(t-t_i)$, with exponents transitioning from $t^{1/2}$ to $(t-t_i)^{1/2}$ and $(t-t_i)^{1/4}$ \cite{ZhouLiLaiWei2019}. || It is a conservative bridge between two known-biased alternatives: raw field-of-view-capped endpoints underestimate the continuation, while imposing a rigid Hiroyasu--Arai-style law can overestimate late short-pulse penetration because it does not represent the delayed-clock post-EOI deceleration branch \cite{HiroyasuArai1990,ZhouLiLaiWei2019}. || From this starting point, two functional primitives are chosen: \(\sqrt{t}\) to span the early post-breakup quasi-steady regime familiar from the H--A framework, and \(t^{1/4}\) to capture the empirically observed late-stage deceleration associated with post-injection dynamics \cite{ZhouLiLaiWei2019}. || distinguishes between a global injection clock \(t\) and a delayed clock \((t-t_i)\), because the late-stage penetration branch is activated only after the end-of-injection dynamics propagate downstream\cite{ZhouLiLaiWei2019}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 经验模型结构紧凑且便于解释，但短预喷会使其使用更加困难，因为可观测窗口可能主要由喷射起始与喷射终止瞬态占据 \cite{ZhouLiYi2021,ZhouLiLaiWei2019}。 || 经典经验贯穿距离定律在物理上仍具有重要价值，但当观测窗口主要由喷射起始与喷射终止瞬态占据时， 其适用性会明显下降，或需以显著增加模型复杂度为代价 \cite{HiroyasuArai1990,ZhouLiYi2021,ZhouLiLaiWei2019}。 || Zhou 等指出，喷射结束（EOI）后尖端贯穿距离进入减速分支，时间坐标从 ASOI 时钟 $t$ 转变为延迟时钟 $(t-t_i)$，指数从 $t^{1/2}$ 过渡到 $(t-t_i)^{1/2}$ 和 $(t-t_i)^{1/4}$ \cite{ZhouLiLaiWei2019}。 || 它是在两个已知有偏替代方案之间建立的保守桥接：原始视场封顶端点会低估后续贯穿距离，而直接强加刚性的 Hiroyasu--Arai 式规律又可能因缺少喷射结束后的延迟时钟减速分支而高估短脉冲晚期贯穿距离 \cite{HiroyasuArai1990,ZhouLiLaiWei2019}。 || 在此起点上，选取两个函数基元：\(\sqrt{t}\) 覆盖 H--A 框架所熟知的早期破碎后准稳态区间，\(t^{1/4}\) 则捕捉与喷射结束后动力学相关的经验性晚期减速行为\cite{ZhouLiLaiWei2019}。 || Zhou等人的EOI后模型区分了全局喷射时钟 \(t\) 和延迟时钟 \((t-t_i)\)，因为晚期贯穿距离分支仅在喷射结束动力学向下游传播后才被激活\cite{ZhouLiLaiWei2019}。
english_reference_meaning: Supports the discussion that end-of-injection penetration behavior changes time variables and regimes after injection stops.
chinese_reference_meaning: 用于支撑结束注入后穿深阶段和时间变量会发生变化的论述。

english_citation_sentences: Empirical penetration correlations and phenomenological models can rapidly describe spray development; comparing penetration length against wall distance naturally yields a geometric criterion for first-order wall impingement screening \cite{HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996,Baumgarten2006MixFormation}. || Empirical penetration correlations and phenomenological models have also long been employed in diesel-spray research to describe spray development rapidly; in this context, comparing penetration with wall distance provides a natural first-order geometric criterion for impingement screening \cite{HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996,Baumgarten2006MixFormation}. || Among these, penetration is the core input for subsequent trajectory fitting, surrogate modeling, and wall-impingement risk screening \cite{Linne2013SprayImaging,LefebvreMcDonell2017,Dent1971Penetration,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996}. || The Naber--Siebers correlation retains a similar momentum scaling but places more emphasis on the impact of ambient gas density and spray dispersion angle on penetration \cite{NaberSiebers1996}. || This CDF front is one of the pipeline's primary practical contributions: it is far less sensitive to fractured leading-edge pixels than a naive maximum-index definition, while still yielding a penetration quantity consistent with standard diesel spray conventions \cite{Dent1971Penetration,HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996}. || Considering the sensitivity of diesel spray penetration to ambient gas density, this decoupling should be apprehended as a pragmatic modeling choice, rather than a proof that pressure and gas flow effects are negligible \cite{NaberSiebers1996}. || Existing spray literature indicates that the spreading angle varies with transient development, ambient gas density, injection conditions, and nozzle geometry \cite{NaberSiebers1996,JungManinSkeenPickett2015}.

english_citation_sentences: Therefore, these operations not only have a clear image processing rationale but are also naturally suited for tensorized CUDA (Compute Unified Device Architecture) parallel implementations organized under the Single Instruction Multiple Thread (SIMT) execution model of GPU hardware \cite{NickollsBuckGarlandSkadron2008,GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}. || Building upon this, log-domain background subtraction and foreground construction draw on the basic idea of homomorphic signal processing: when the image formation process contains multiplicative components, taking the logarithm transforms multiplicative disturbances into additive ones, thereby improving the stability of subsequent background subtraction and filtering \cite{OppenheimSchaferStockham1968,GonzalezWoodsDIP}. || Following foreground construction, Sobel-like gradient magnitude operators, percentile scaling, automated thresholding, and morphological operations are sequentially applied to enhance and extract the spray boundaries while suppressing diffuse low-frequency background structures \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision,ZackRogersLatt1977}. || GPUs are particularly suited for dense array operations, template-based neighborhood computations, and repetitive map-reduce pattern workloads, as the same arithmetic pattern can be executed in parallel over vast numbers of data elements \cite{NickollsBuckGarlandSkadron2008}; the operators used in this thesis are themselves standard image processing primitives \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}. || This sequence is critical for Mie videos, as the raw intensity is not a direct measure of liquid volume fraction; the actual goal is to stably extract geometry under non-uniform illumination, glare, and background textures, rather than performing a rigorous optical inversion \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,GonzalezWoodsDIP}. || Quantitative computations use a robust background estimation from pre-injection statistics, and convert the representation into an edge-dominant Sobel feature space, ensuring the geometric response is dictated by fixed operators and local boundary structures rather than display brightness \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,GonzalezWoodsDIP}. || The contribution here lies not in the Sobel operator itself, but in its integration into a batch video workflow that avoids repeated host-device copies, preparing a consistent downstream geometric processing for each plume \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 因此，这些操作不仅具有明确的图像处理依据，也天然适合按 GPU 硬件单指令多线程（SIMT）执行模型组织的张量化 CUDA（统一计算设备架构）并行实现 \cite{NickollsBuckGarlandSkadron2008,GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}。 || 在此基础上，对数域背景消除与前景构建借鉴了同态信号处理的基本思想： 当图像形成过程含有乘性成分时，取对数可将乘法扰动转化为加性扰动，从而提高后续背景扣除和滤波的稳定性 \cite{OppenheimSchaferStockham1968,GonzalezWoodsDIP}。 || 前景构建之后，Sobel 类梯度幅值算子、百分位缩放、自动阈值和形态学操作被依次用于增强并提取喷雾边界，同时压低弥散的低频背景结构 \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision,ZackRogersLatt1977}。 || GPU 特别适合稠密阵列运算、模板式邻域计算和重复 map--reduce 模式为主的负载，因为同一算术模式可在大量数据元素上并行执行 \cite{NickollsBuckGarlandSkadron2008}；本文所用算子本身亦为标准图像处理基元 \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}。 || 这一序列对 Mie 视频很重要，因为原始强度并不是液体体积分数的直接度量，而实际目标是在非均匀照明、眩光和背景纹理下稳定提取几何，而不是做精确光学反演 \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,GonzalezWoodsDIP}。 || 定量计算则使用喷射前统计得到的稳健背景估计，再把表示转换成边缘主导的 Sobel 特征，使几何响应主要由固定算子和局部边界结构决定，而不是由显示亮度决定 \cite{BohrenHuffman2004,Linne2013SprayImaging,GonzalezWoodsDIP}。 || 这里的贡献不在于 Sobel 算子本身，而在于把它集成进一条避免反复主机--设备拷贝的批量视频工作流中，为每个羽流准备一致的下游几何处理 \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}。
english_reference_meaning: Supports the image-processing choices: log-domain preprocessing, gradients, thresholding, morphology, and boundary extraction.
chinese_reference_meaning: 用于支撑对数预处理、梯度算子、阈值、形态学和边界提取等图像处理步骤。

english_citation_sentences: Equally important is that quantitative processing should strive to preserve the linear response of the camera's raw gray values, and should not use display-oriented gamma correction, frame-by-frame display gain, or local contrast enhancement as measurement inputs \cite{Cromey2010TwistedPixels}. || This example does not dictate which display gain is physically more truthful, but illustrates that if gamma-corrected, display-gain-adjusted, or locally contrast-enhanced frames were used for boundary extraction, the boundaries would shift with the display mapping \cite{Cromey2010TwistedPixels}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 同样重要的是，定量处理应尽量保留相机原始灰度的线性响应，而不应将面向显示的 gamma 校正、逐帧显示增益或局部对比度增强作为测量输入 \cite{Cromey2010TwistedPixels}。 || 这个例子并不是在说明哪种显示增益更接近物理真实，而是在说明如果把 gamma 校正、显示增益调整或局部对比度增强后的帧用于边界提取，边界会随着显示映射而变化 \cite{Cromey2010TwistedPixels}。
english_reference_meaning: Scientific-image-processing ethics: nonlinear display adjustments (gamma, display gain, local contrast) must not be treated as quantitative measurement inputs.
chinese_reference_meaning: 科学图像处理伦理：gamma、显示增益、局部对比度等非线性显示调整不得作为定量测量输入。
verification_notes: Checked DOI and accessible metadata. The paper classifies scientific digital images as data, identifies gamma and histogram-based adjustments as operations that can alter intensity relationships, and states that intensity measurements should use uniformly processed data calibrated to a known standard.

english_citation_sentences: Therefore, these operations not only have a clear image processing rationale but are also naturally suited for tensorized CUDA (Compute Unified Device Architecture) parallel implementations organized under the Single Instruction Multiple Thread (SIMT) execution model of GPU hardware \cite{NickollsBuckGarlandSkadron2008,GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}. || Following foreground construction, Sobel-like gradient magnitude operators, percentile scaling, automated thresholding, and morphological operations are sequentially applied to enhance and extract the spray boundaries while suppressing diffuse low-frequency background structures \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision,ZackRogersLatt1977}. || To this end, the workflow transitions from Cartesian image coordinates to nozzle-centered polar coordinates, folding the 2D repeating structure into a 1D occupancy signal along the angular axis \cite{Szeliski2010Vision}. || GPUs are particularly suited for dense array operations, template-based neighborhood computations, and repetitive map-reduce pattern workloads, as the same arithmetic pattern can be executed in parallel over vast numbers of data elements \cite{NickollsBuckGarlandSkadron2008}; the operators used in this thesis are themselves standard image processing primitives \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}. || The contribution here lies not in the Sobel operator itself, but in its integration into a batch video workflow that avoids repeated host-device copies, preparing a consistent downstream geometric processing for each plume \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}. || Conceptually, this radially compresses the 2D image into a 1D angular occupancy signal; for multi-hole alignment, it is significantly more stable than edge fragments in the raw frames \cite{Szeliski2010Vision}. || While FFT itself is standard, the contribution here is transforming the angular density signal into an automatic plume registration rule using the known multi-hole count of the injector while preserving plume-to-plume asymmetry in the downstream observables \cite{CooleyTukey1965FFT,Szeliski2010Vision}. || Because the inverse map is precomputed once per plume angle, the per-frame overhead is rotation-agnostic; all subsequent metrics are measured in this shared local strip coordinate system \cite{Szeliski2010Vision}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 因此，这些操作不仅具有明确的图像处理依据，也天然适合按 GPU 硬件单指令多线程（SIMT）执行模型组织的张量化 CUDA（统一计算设备架构）并行实现 \cite{NickollsBuckGarlandSkadron2008,GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}。 || 前景构建之后，Sobel 类梯度幅值算子、百分位缩放、自动阈值和形态学操作被依次用于增强并提取喷雾边界，同时压低弥散的低频背景结构 \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision,ZackRogersLatt1977}。 || 为此，工作流从笛卡尔图像坐标转向喷嘴中心极坐标，将二维重复结构折叠为角度轴上的一维占据信号 \cite{Szeliski2010Vision}。 || GPU 特别适合稠密阵列运算、模板式邻域计算和重复 map--reduce 模式为主的负载，因为同一算术模式可在大量数据元素上并行执行 \cite{NickollsBuckGarlandSkadron2008}；本文所用算子本身亦为标准图像处理基元 \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}。 || 这里的贡献不在于 Sobel 算子本身，而在于把它集成进一条避免反复主机--设备拷贝的批量视频工作流中，为每个羽流准备一致的下游几何处理 \cite{GonzalezWoodsDIP,Szeliski2010Vision}。 || 概念上，这是把 2D 图像径向压缩成一个 1D 角度占用信号；对多孔对齐而言，它比原始帧中的边缘碎片稳定得多 \cite{Szeliski2010Vision}。 || FFT 本身是标准方法；这里的贡献在于利用已知喷油器多孔数，把角度密度信号转成一条自动羽流配准规则 \cite{CooleyTukey1965FFT,Szeliski2010Vision}。 || 每个羽流角只需预计算一次逆映射，因此逐帧开销与旋转无关；后续所有度量都在同一个局部条带坐标系里测量 \cite{Szeliski2010Vision}。
english_reference_meaning: Supports computer-vision operations such as polar resampling, inverse warping, image primitives, and geometric remapping.
chinese_reference_meaning: 用于支撑极坐标重采样、逆映射、图像处理原语和几何重映射等计算机视觉操作。

authors: Engine Combustion Network
title: Liquid Penetration Length
english_citation_sentences: \cite{MagnottiGenzale2013,JohnsonNaberLee2012,ecn_liquid_penetration,ecn_liquid_penetration_accessory}. || The Engine Combustion Network (ECN) benchmark studies provided systematic evidence for this methodological dependency: inter-facility comparisons of nominally identical injectors (Spray~A and Spray~D) revealed scatter in liquid-phase penetration arising from a combination of genuine ambient-condition differences, distinct optical setups (DBI versus Mie), and post-processing threshold definitions \cite{ecn_liquid_penetration,ecn_liquid_penetration_accessory,MeijerECN2012}. || The extracted spray boundaries represent the liquid-phase envelope observed in Mie imaging under a specific optical protocol, not the complete in-cylinder liquid-phase ground truth \cite{ecn_liquid_penetration,ecn_liquid_penetration_accessory}. || Thus, the derived penetration should be construed as the continuation of the Mie-defined geometric envelope, rather than direct evidence of a robust liquid-phase spray tip, localized liquid mass, droplet size, phase state, or the potential for wall film formation \cite{ecn_liquid_penetration,ecn_liquid_penetration_accessory}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 喷雾成像文献也表明，贯穿距离、锥角和边界位置并非脱离方法而存在的绝对真值， 而是由诊断方式、阈值规则和后处理定义共同生成的操作性观测量， 即依赖具体测量协议定义的可重复量，而非独立于方法的物理真值 \cite{MagnottiGenzale2013,JohnsonNaberLee2012,ecn_liquid_penetration,ecn_liquid_penetration_accessory}。 || Engine Combustion Network（ECN）的基准研究为这种方法依赖性提供了系统证据： 名义上相同喷油器（Spray~A 和 Spray~D）的跨机构比较揭示，液相贯穿距离的差散源于真实环境条件差异、不同光学设置（DBI 与 Mie）以及后处理阈值定义的共同作用 \cite{ecn_liquid_penetration,ecn_liquid_penetration_accessory,MeijerECN2012}。 || 提取的喷雾边界反映的是特定光学方案下米氏散射图像所呈现的液相包络，而非缸内液相分布的完整真值 \cite{ecn_liquid_penetration,ecn_liquid_penetration_accessory}。 || 因此，得到的贯穿距离应被理解为 Mie 定义的几何包络延续，而不是强液相喷雾尖端、局部液体质量、液滴尺寸、相态或壁膜形成潜力的直接证据 \cite{ecn_liquid_penetration,ecn_liquid_penetration_accessory}。
english_reference_meaning: Supports the ECN definition and method-dependence of liquid-penetration measurements.
chinese_reference_meaning: 用于支撑 ECN 对液相穿深定义及其方法依赖性的说明。

english_citation_sentences: Recent studies show that neural networks can predict macroscopic spray characteristics, such as penetration and cone angle, leveraging operating conditions \cite{VazKarathanasis2026,liu2020sprayreview}. || High-fidelity CFD is information-rich, but it requires complex inputs, model tuning, and substantial computational resources; existing reacting diesel-spray LES studies show that a single higher-fidelity simulation can consume tens of thousands of CPU core-hours \cite{CurtisNiemeyerSung2017,liu2020sprayreview}. || Recent studies have shown that neural networks can predict macroscopic spray properties such as penetration and cone angle from operating-condition parameters, providing a predictive approach that is faster than high-fidelity CFD while more flexible than fixed-form empirical models \cite{VazKarathanasis2026,liu2020sprayreview}. || Internal nozzle flow under high pressure and potential cavitation further alter the jet structure and atomization state, mechanisms which classical penetration correlations do not attempt to characterize \cite{liu2020sprayreview}.

english_citation_sentences: If the liquid-phase envelope reaches the piston crown or cylinder liner prior to the formation of an effective ignition kernel, it may induce wall wetting, lubricating oil dilution, deteriorated mixture preparation, and elevated unburned hydrocarbon emissions \cite{peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution,MorieiraMotaPanao2010}. || If its liquid envelope reaches the piston crown or cylinder wall before a useful ignition kernel forms, wall wetting, lube-oil dilution, degraded mixture preparation, and increased unburned-hydrocarbon emissions may follow \cite{peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution,MorieiraMotaPanao2010}. || If liquid fuel reaches the piston crown or cylinder wall before evaporating or igniting, a fuel film may form on the wall, leading to wall wetting, localized mixing deterioration, elevated unburned hydrocarbon emissions, and lube oil dilution \cite{peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution,MorieiraMotaPanao2010}. || used a single-hole nozzle and a temperature-controlled flat wall system to measure spray impingement, characterizing how the penetration-wall distance relationship varies with ambient density and temperature \cite{peraza2022swi}. || What truly warrants prioritized attention is direct liquid droplet impingement and continuous wall film formation \cite{MorieiraMotaPanao2010,liu2024marine_impingement,peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 若液相包络在形成有效点火核之前到达活塞顶或缸壁，可能导致壁面润湿、润滑油稀释、混合准备恶化以及未燃碳氢排放升高 \cite{peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution,MorieiraMotaPanao2010}。 || 若液相包络在形成有效点火核之前已触及活塞顶或缸壁， 则可能导致壁面润湿、润滑油稀释、局部混合恶化以及未燃碳氢排放升高等不利后果 \cite{peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution,MorieiraMotaPanao2010}。 || 若液态燃料在蒸发或点火之前到达活塞顶或缸壁，壁面上可能形成燃油液膜，并造成壁面润湿、局部混合恶化、未燃碳氢排放升高以及机油稀释 \cite{peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution,MorieiraMotaPanao2010}。 || ECN 框架下，Peraza 等人使用单孔喷嘴和受控温度平板壁面系统测量喷雾撞壁，刻画了贯穿距离-壁距关系如何随环境密度和温度变化 \cite{peraza2022swi}。 || 真正需要优先关注的是直接液滴撞壁和持续壁膜形成 \cite{MorieiraMotaPanao2010,liu2024marine_impingement,peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution}。

title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning

english_citation_sentences: A multilayer perceptron (MLP) is adopted: it retains universal function-approximation capability \cite{Hornik1989UAT} while offering a practical compromise among training cost, implementation complexity, and engineering auditability \cite{BishopPRML2006}. || In regression form, it corresponds to the conditional model \[ y=\mu(x,t)+\varepsilon(x,t),\qquad \varepsilon(x,t)\sim \mathcal{N}(0,\sigma^2(x,t)), \] where the Gaussian distribution should be understood as a practical statistical assumption rather than a claim that spray physics truly obeys a Gaussian distribution at every instant \cite{BishopPRML2006,KendallGal2017}. || \left(\mathcal{N}(\mu_1,\sigma_1^2)\,\|\,\mathcal{N}(\mu_2,\sigma_2^2)\right) =\log\frac{\sigma_2}{\sigma_1}+\frac{\sigma_1^2+(\mu_1-\mu_2)^2}{2\sigma_2^2}-\frac{1}{2}, \] meaning the distillation loss can be calculated precisely without Monte Carlo sampling, and without introducing extra gradient variance to the training process \cite{BishopPRML2006,KendallGal2017}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 与这一工作流视角一致，本文有意保持代理模型主干的简朴：采用多层感知器（Multilayer Perceptron, MLP）作为合理的基线架构： 它既保留了通用函数逼近能力 \cite{Hornik1989UAT}，又在训练成本、实现复杂度和工程可审计性之间提供了较稳妥的折中 \cite{BishopPRML2006}。 || 在回归形式上，它对应条件模型 \[ y=\mu(x,t)+\varepsilon(x,t),\qquad \varepsilon(x,t)\sim \mathcal{N}(0,\sigma^2(x,t)), \] 这里的高斯分布应理解为实用统计假设，而非声称喷雾物理在每个瞬间均真实服从高斯分布 \cite{BishopPRML2006,KendallGal2017}。 || \left(\mathcal{N}(\mu_1,\sigma_1^2)\,\|\,\mathcal{N}(\mu_2,\sigma_2^2)\right) =\log\frac{\sigma_2}{\sigma_1}+\frac{\sigma_1^2+(\mu_1-\mu_2)^2}{2\sigma_2^2}-\frac{1}{2}, \] 这意味着蒸馏损失可以精确计算，无需蒙特卡洛采样，也不会向训练过程额外引入梯度方差 \cite{BishopPRML2006,KendallGal2017}。

authors: Baumgarten, Carsten
title: Mixture Formation in Internal Combustion Engines
manual_reason: No clearly legal open PDF/HTML download was found automatically; use the DOI/URL manually or through institutional access if needed.
english_citation_sentences: Empirical penetration correlations and phenomenological models can rapidly describe spray development; comparing penetration length against wall distance naturally yields a geometric criterion for first-order wall impingement screening \cite{HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996,Baumgarten2006MixFormation}. || Empirical penetration correlations and phenomenological models have also long been employed in diesel-spray research to describe spray development rapidly; in this context, comparing penetration with wall distance provides a natural first-order geometric criterion for impingement screening \cite{HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996,Baumgarten2006MixFormation}. || In engineering, the most direct screening rule is relatively clear: compare the liquid tip penetration $S_\mathrm{tip}(t)$ with the distance from the nozzle to the wall $L_\mathrm{wall}$; when \(S_\mathrm{tip}(t) \geq L_\mathrm{wall}\), it is flagged as an impingement \cite{Baumgarten2006MixFormation}. || In Baumgarten's systematic treatise on mixture formation in internal combustion engines, penetration correlations are treated as baseline tools for simplifying spray trajectories, and the comparison of penetration with wall distance serves as the first-order impingement criterion \cite{Baumgarten2006MixFormation}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 经验贯穿距离关联式和现象学模型可快速描述喷雾发展，将贯穿距离与壁距比较则构成了一阶撞壁筛查的自然几何判据 \cite{HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996,Baumgarten2006MixFormation}。 || 柴油喷雾研究也长期使用经验贯穿距离关联式和现象学模型快速描述喷雾发展， 其中贯穿距离与壁距的比较构成了一阶撞壁筛查的自然几何判据 \cite{HiroyasuArai1990,NaberSiebers1996,Baumgarten2006MixFormation}。 || 工程上最直接的筛查规则相对明确： 比较液相尖端贯穿距离 $S_\mathrm{tip}(t)$ 与喷嘴到壁面的距离 $L_\mathrm{wall}$，当 \(S_\mathrm{tip}(t) \geq L_\mathrm{wall}\) 时标记为撞壁 \cite{Baumgarten2006MixFormation}。 || Baumgarten 关于内燃机混合气形成的系统论述中，也把贯穿距离关联式视为简化喷雾轨迹的基线工具，并把贯穿距离与壁距比较作为一阶撞壁判据 \cite{Baumgarten2006MixFormation}。

title: Advances and Challenges in Explaining Fuel Spray Impingement: How Much of Single Droplet Impact Research Is Useful?
container: Progress in Energy and Combustion Science
manual_reason: No clearly legal open PDF/HTML download was found automatically; use the DOI/URL manually or through institutional access if needed.
english_citation_sentences: If the liquid-phase envelope reaches the piston crown or cylinder liner prior to the formation of an effective ignition kernel, it may induce wall wetting, lubricating oil dilution, deteriorated mixture preparation, and elevated unburned hydrocarbon emissions \cite{peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution,MorieiraMotaPanao2010}. || If its liquid envelope reaches the piston crown or cylinder wall before a useful ignition kernel forms, wall wetting, lube-oil dilution, degraded mixture preparation, and increased unburned-hydrocarbon emissions may follow \cite{peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution,MorieiraMotaPanao2010}. || If liquid fuel reaches the piston crown or cylinder wall before evaporating or igniting, a fuel film may form on the wall, leading to wall wetting, localized mixing deterioration, elevated unburned hydrocarbon emissions, and lube oil dilution \cite{peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution,MorieiraMotaPanao2010}. || note in their review that while single droplet impact studies have indeed accumulated a wealth of fundamental knowledge, directly extrapolating it to continuous spray impingement is unsafe, because the collective behavior of a spray plume is further modulated by adjacent droplet interactions, residual wall films, and secondary atomization \cite{MorieiraMotaPanao2010}. || What truly warrants prioritized attention is direct liquid droplet impingement and continuous wall film formation \cite{MorieiraMotaPanao2010,liu2024marine_impingement,peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 若液相包络在形成有效点火核之前到达活塞顶或缸壁，可能导致壁面润湿、润滑油稀释、混合准备恶化以及未燃碳氢排放升高 \cite{peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution,MorieiraMotaPanao2010}。 || 若液相包络在形成有效点火核之前已触及活塞顶或缸壁， 则可能导致壁面润湿、润滑油稀释、局部混合恶化以及未燃碳氢排放升高等不利后果 \cite{peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution,MorieiraMotaPanao2010}。 || 若液态燃料在蒸发或点火之前到达活塞顶或缸壁，壁面上可能形成燃油液膜，并造成壁面润湿、局部混合恶化、未燃碳氢排放升高以及机油稀释 \cite{peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution,MorieiraMotaPanao2010}。 || Moreira 等在综述中指出，单液滴撞击研究确实积累了大量基础知识， 但将其直接外推至连续喷雾撞壁并不稳妥，因为喷雾 plume 的集体行为还受到邻近液滴相互作用、残余壁膜和二次雾化等因素调制 \cite{MorieiraMotaPanao2010}。 || 真正需要优先关注的是直接液滴撞壁和持续壁膜形成 \cite{MorieiraMotaPanao2010,liu2024marine_impingement,peraza2022swi,ahmad2025fueldilution}。

authors: Karim, Ghazi A.
title: Dual-Fuel Diesel Engines
manual_reason: No DOI or URL is present in the BibTeX entry; manual lookup is required.
english_citation_sentences: That kernel, in turn, governs main-fuel mixing, flame propagation, and overall combustion efficiency \cite{Karim2015DualFuel,WeiGeng2016DualFuelReview,Sahoo2009DualFuelReview}. || That placement affects main-fuel mixing, flame propagation, and overall combustion efficiency \cite{Karim2015DualFuel,WeiGeng2016DualFuelReview,Sahoo2009DualFuelReview}. || In dual-fuel diesel-gas engines, the geometric distribution of the pre-injection spray---including penetration, cone angle, and the extent of liquid-phase spread---directly determines the spatial position and size of the ignition kernel, and thereby affects whether the flame can efficiently propagate into the premixed main fuel gas charge \cite{Karim2015DualFuel,WeiGeng2016DualFuelReview,Sahoo2009DualFuelReview}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 对于喷油器开发而言，核心控制问题因此是预喷喷雾本身的空间发展：贯穿距离、锥角和形态决定点火核的位置与体积，进而影响主燃料混合、火焰传播和整体燃烧效率 \cite{Karim2015DualFuel,WeiGeng2016DualFuelReview,Sahoo2009DualFuelReview}。 || 对于喷油器开发而言，核心问题首先是如何控制预喷的空间发展： pilot 贯穿距离、锥角和液相包络决定点火核在气缸内形成的位置、尺度和与主燃料充量的相对关系， 进而影响主燃料混合、火焰传播和燃烧效率 \cite{Karim2015DualFuel,WeiGeng2016DualFuelReview,Sahoo2009DualFuelReview}。 || 在双燃料柴油-气体发动机中，预喷喷雾的几何分布——包括贯穿距离、锥角与液相延伸范围——直接决定点火核的空间位置与尺寸， 并由此影响火焰能否高效传播至预混的主燃料气体充量 \cite{Karim2015DualFuel,WeiGeng2016DualFuelReview,Sahoo2009DualFuelReview}。
english_reference_meaning: Foundational textbook reference linking pilot-spray characteristics in dual-fuel diesel-gas engines to ignition-kernel formation and downstream main-fuel flame propagation.
chinese_reference_meaning: 用于支撑在双燃料柴油-气体发动机中，pilot 喷雾特性决定点火核形成与主燃料火焰传播的论述基础。

authors: Wei, Liangjie and Geng, Peng
title: A review on natural gas/diesel dual fuel combustion, emissions and performance
manual_reason: No clearly legal open PDF/HTML download was found automatically; use the DOI/URL manually or through institutional access if needed.
english_citation_sentences: That kernel, in turn, governs main-fuel mixing, flame propagation, and overall combustion efficiency \cite{Karim2015DualFuel,WeiGeng2016DualFuelReview,Sahoo2009DualFuelReview}. || That placement affects main-fuel mixing, flame propagation, and overall combustion efficiency \cite{Karim2015DualFuel,WeiGeng2016DualFuelReview,Sahoo2009DualFuelReview}. || In dual-fuel diesel-gas engines, the geometric distribution of the pre-injection spray---including penetration, cone angle, and the extent of liquid-phase spread---directly determines the spatial position and size of the ignition kernel, and thereby affects whether the flame can efficiently propagate into the premixed main fuel gas charge \cite{Karim2015DualFuel,WeiGeng2016DualFuelReview,Sahoo2009DualFuelReview}. || , methane slip), and a corresponding drop in overall combustion efficiency; If the pre-injection penetration is too long, even if definitive impingement has not yet occurred, it may alter the relative position of the ignition kernel to the gas charge, leading to incomplete combustion of the main fuel and increasing the likelihood of liquid-phase wall impingement \cite{WeiGeng2016DualFuelReview,Sahoo2009DualFuelReview}.
chinese_citation_sentences: 对于喷油器开发而言，核心控制问题因此是预喷喷雾本身的空间发展：贯穿距离、锥角和形态决定点火核的位置与体积，进而影响主燃料混合、火焰传播和整体燃烧效率 \cite{Karim2015DualFuel,WeiGeng2016DualFuelReview,Sahoo2009DualFuelReview}。 || 对于喷油器开发而言，核心问题首先是如何控制预喷的空间发展： pilot 贯穿距离、锥角和液相包络决定点火核在气缸内形成的位置、尺度和与主燃料充量的相对关系， 进而影响主燃料混合、火焰传播和燃烧效率 \cite{Karim2015DualFuel,WeiGeng2016DualFuelReview,Sahoo2009DualFuelReview}。 || 在双燃料柴油-气体发动机中，预喷喷雾的几何分布——包括贯穿距离、锥角与液相延伸范围——直接决定点火核的空间位置与尺寸， 并由此影响火焰能否高效传播至预混的主燃料气体充量 \cite{Karim2015DualFuel,WeiGeng2016DualFuelReview,Sahoo2009DualFuelReview}。 || 若预喷贯穿距离过短，点火核位置偏离合适区域或体积不足，可能导致主燃料火焰传播不充分、未燃碳氢化合物（如甲烷滑漏）升高，整体燃烧效率随之下降； 若预喷贯穿距离过长，则即便尚未发生明确撞壁，也可能改变点火核与气体充量的相对位置，导致主燃料燃烧不充分，并增加液相撞壁的可能性 \cite{WeiGeng2016DualFuelReview,Sahoo2009DualFuelReview}。
english_reference_meaning: Peer-reviewed review on how pilot diesel injection parameters (timing, quantity, spray characteristics) affect combustion efficiency and unburned-methane emissions in natural-gas/diesel dual-fuel engines.
chinese_reference_meaning: 用于支撑 pilot 柴油喷射参数（定时、油量、喷雾特性）对天然气/柴油双燃料燃烧效率及未燃甲烷排放的影响。
verification_notes: Checked direct URL, arXiv when applicable, and OpenAlex OA metadata.

english_citation_sentences: For this thesis, the deterministic Stage~1 mean fit is a stabilising step: training a heteroscedastic Gaussian head from scratch can let the variance branch absorb mean errors, down-weight difficult samples, and slow or destabilise the mean fit, a failure mode documented in variance-network and \(\beta\)-NLL (negative log-likelihood, NLL) studies \cite{Detlefsen2019VarianceNetworks,Seitzer2022PitfallsHeteroscedastic}.

english_reference_meaning: Evidence that training a variance network from scratch can destabilise the mean fit, motivating the deterministic-first training curriculum.
